### User *(2026-04-15T18:47:25.700Z)*

**Tool result**
```
   207→## 5. Script: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`
   208→
   209→### 4.1 Header
   210→
   211→```
   212→Purpose:    Generate lookup_dctype_to_class.csv — type dispatch table mapping
   213→            (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) to mocho-aligned rdf:type class IRIs.
   214→            Used by transform_edm_to_mocho.py for domain-specific rdf:type dispatch.
   215→Usage:      python gen_dctype_class_mapping.py
   216→Inputs:     scripts/old-config/type2class.json
   217→            scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json
   218→Outputs:    output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv
   219→Deps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib)
   220→Assumes:    old-config files are read-only reference; class mapping to mocho-aligned
   221→            equivalents is encoded in CLASS_MAP dict in this script.
   222→```
   223→
   224→### 4.2 Implementation steps
   225→
   226→1. **Load source files** — `type2class.json` (general) and `audio_type2class.json` (audio).
   227→
   228→2. **Define `CLASS_MAP`** — dict mapping old FRBR/FaBiO class strings → new mocho-aligned IRIs:
   229→   ```python
   230→   CLASS_MAP = {
   231→       "mo:MusicalWork":           "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalWork",
   232→       "mo:MusicalManifestation":  "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalManifestation",
   233→       "mo:Record":                "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/Record",
   234→       "aco:AudioClip":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip",
   235→       "aco:AudioItem":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioItem",
   236→       "aco:AudioFile":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile",
   237→       "fabio:AudioDocument":      "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/AudioDocument",
   238→       "fabio:DoctoralThesis":     "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/DoctoralThesis",
   239→       "fabio:MastersThesis":      "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/MastersThesis",
   240→       "fabio:Thesis":             "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Thesis",
   241→       "fabio:Textbook":           "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Textbook",
   242→       "fabio:NewspaperArticle":   "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/NewspaperArticle",
   243→       "fabio:ReportDocument":     "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/ReportDocument",
   244→       "fabio:WorkCollection":     "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/WorkCollection",
   245→       "doco:Section":             "http://purl.org/spar/doco/Section",
   246→       # Generic FaBiO carriers (redundant with mocho:Manifestation) → omit
   247→       "fabio:PrintObject":        "",
   248→       "fabio:AnalogItem":         "",
   249→       "fabio:DigitalItem":        "",
   250→       "frbr:Work":                "",
   251→       "frbr:Manifestation":       "",
   252→       "frbr:Item":                "",
   253→       # TBD entries — flag for manual review
   254→       "vra:Image":                "TBD",
   255→       "rico:Record":              "http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record",
   256→   }
   257→   ```
   258→
   259→3. **Process audio entries** (`audio_type2class.json`):
   260→   - For each key (dc_type_de): read `class` array (positional: [W, E, M, I])
   261→   - Flatten lists at position M (e.g. `["mo:Record", "aco:AudioClip"]`) → use first non-empty as primary
   262→   - Apply `CLASS_MAP` to resolve full IRIs; skip empty strings
   263→   - Set `mediatype = mt001`, `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field
   264→   - Emit one row per dc_type_de
   265→
   266→4. **Process general entries** (`type2class.json`):
   267→   - Same positional class array processing
   268→   - `mediatype = any` (the transform uses mediatype to route audio to audio_type2class; remaining types go here)
   269→   - Keep `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field
   270→
   271→5. **Add manual Photo/Video rows** — hard-coded in the script:
   272→   - `(mt002, sparte005, any, Photo/Museum)` → `rdf_type_m = vra:Image` (TBD pending VRA IRI confirmation)
   273→   - `(mt002, sparte001, any, Photo/Archive)` → `rdf_type_m = rico:Record`
   274→
   275→6. **Write CSV** — sort by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de).
   276→
   277→7. **Print summary**: total rows, rows with rdf_type_m populated, rows with TBD IRIs (need follow-up).
   278→
   279→---
   280→
   281→## 5. Dispatch priority and combination rules
   282→
   283→Four dimensions can contribute rdf:type triples for a ProvidedCHO. Their roles
   284→are complementary, not competing:
   285→
   286→| Dimension | Source | Output | When |
   287→|---|---|---|---|
   288→| `htype` | `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | DoCO class (library) or RiC-O class (archival) | htype_001–029 → DoCO; htype_030–048 → RiC-O |
   289→| `mediatype` × `sector` × `dc:type` | `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | Domain class (ACO/MO/VRA/FaBiO/etc.) | Any ProvidedCHO with a dc:type value |
   290→| base | hardcoded | `mocho:Manifestation` | Always |
   291→
   292→**Combination rule**: Accumulate — both htype and dc:type dispatch can fire
   293→for the same entity. Identical rdf:type IRIs are deduped. Both layers are
   294→independent: an archival letter can be both `rico:Record` (from htype_034) AND
   295→`fabio:Letter` (from dc:type `Brief`). Neither blocks the other.
   296→
   297→### 5.1 Separation by htype domain
   298→
   299→- htype_030–048 (archival): htype dispatch produces RiC-O classes; dc:type dispatch
   300→  may also produce a more specific document genre class. Both emitted.
   301→- htype_001–029 (library/DoCO): htype dispatch produces DoCO structural classes
   302→  (Chapter, Section, etc.); dc:type dispatch may produce a FaBiO publication type.
   303→  Both emitted if present.
   304→- No htype: only dc:type dispatch contributes a specific class (beyond mocho:Manifestation).
   305→
   306→### 5.2 mediatype gates the dispatch table
   307→
   308→- `mt001` (Audio): use `audio_type2class.json` source rows → ACO/MO classes
   309→- All other mediatypes: use `type2class.json` source rows, filtered by sector
   310→- `mt007` (Not Digitized): follows standard dispatch — htype + sector + dc:type
   311→
   312→### 5.3 Priority order for the transform loop (implemented in `retype_entities()`)
   313→
   314→1. Always emit `mocho:Manifestation`
   315→2. Apply htype dispatch (existing `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`)
   316→3. Apply dc:type dispatch (new `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`), using mediatype to gate table
   317→4. Dedup: collect all rdf:type IRIs in a set, emit each once
   318→
   319→**Validation before finalising**: Run a sampling script (`sample_type_dispatch.py`)
   320→on 50 random records per sector × mediatype cell to show what classes each strategy
   321→would emit. Manual review determines if the accumulate model is correct or if
   322→priority overrides are needed for specific cases.
   323→
   324→---
   325→
   326→## 6. Sampling script: `sample_type_dispatch.py`



```

```json
{
  "plan": "# Plan: Build `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` — Type Dispatch for the Transform\n\n## Context\n\n`transform_edm_to_mocho.py` needs to assign domain-specific rdf:type subclasses to\nProvidedCHO entities based on three dimensions: mediatype (mt001–mt007), sector\n(sparte001–007), and the dc:type string value. This dispatch logic existed in\n`old-config/type2class.json` and `old-config/audio_type2class.json` (FRBR/FaBiO\nclasses, 4 WEMI levels), but was never ported to the mocho-aligned pipeline.\n\nThe current `alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv` only covers property alignment (EDM field →\nRDA property via DC→RDA map). It has no type dispatch. The htype lookup\n(`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) covers archival hierarchy types (htype_030–048) but\nnot the full sector × mediatype × dc:type space.\n\nThis plan builds a new lookup file and generator script to fill that gap. The\ntransform script will use it in `retype_entities()` as a second dispatch after\nthe htype lookup.\n\n---\n\n## 0. Overview\n\nOne-sentence framing of each section, and open questions that must be resolved before implementation.\n\n### 0.1 Section chain\n\n1. **§1 Critical files** — lists all inputs, outputs, and files to update; establishes what exists vs. what must be created.\n2. **§2 Output CSV schema** — defines the lookup table structure and three-level fallback lookup priority that the transform script will use.\n3. **§3 Class mapping** — maps old-config FRBR/FaBiO/WEMI positional entries to mocho-aligned class IRIs per mediatype: audio (§3.1, MO/ACO), text (§3.2, RDA/FaBiO/DoCO), photo (§3.3, VRA+LIO), video (§3.4, EBUCore Plus), not-digitized (§3.5).\n4. **§4 Frequency script** — specifies `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py`: prerequisite script that counts dc:type × sector for mt002/mt005 to populate `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`.\n5. **§5 Generator script** — specifies `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`: reads old-config JSON files, applies CLASS_MAP, adds manual photo/video rows, writes the CSV.\n6. **§6 Dispatch priority** — defines how the four dimensions (base, htype, dc:type, mediatype×sector) combine: accumulate, dedup; mediatype gates the dispatch table; htype and dc:type are independent layers.\n7. **§7 Sampling script** — specifies `sample_type_dispatch.py` for empirical validation of the dispatch model across all sector × mediatype cells before the transform is finalised.\n8. **§8 TBD items** — lists unresolved IRIs and decisions that block implementation.\n9. **§9 ADR entry** — the D11 decision text to add to `alignment-adr.md`.\n10. **§10 Verification** — end-to-end checks: CSV completeness, TBD resolution, spot-checks, sampling review, README + ADR updates.\n\n### 0.2 Open questions\n\n| | # | Question | Blocks |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| ✅ | Q1 | VRA confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`: IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`. Classes: `vra:Image`, `vra:Work`, `vra:Collection`, `vra:Agent`. Use `http://purl.org/vra/Image` for photo Manifestation-level type. | §3.3, §7 |\n| ❓ | Q2 | LIO source found at `mocho/ontology/lio.owl`; IRI base `http://purl.org/net/lio#`; classes: `lio:Image`, `lio:PictorialElement`. `lio_import.owl` exists in `odk-ontology/` but LIO is not in `mocho-full.owl` namespace declarations. **Blocked by**: addition of `lio.owl` import to `mocho-odk` (next mocho update). Until resolved, §3.3 museum photo rows use `vra:Image` only; `lio:Image` added in a follow-up pass after mocho-full.owl is rebuilt with LIO. | §3.3, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q3 | EBUCore Plus confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` (prefix `ebucoreplus`, IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`). Classes: `ebucoreplus:Asset`, `ebucoreplus:EditorialObject`, `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`, `ebucoreplus:MediaResource`, `ebucoreplus:Resource`. Use `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default video Manifestation-level type; `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for editorial/programme content. Correct `ebucore:` prefix → `ebucoreplus:` throughout. | §3.4, §4, §7 |\n| ❓ | Q4 | What dc:type values appear in the corpus for mt002 (Photo) and mt005 (Video), broken down by sector? **Resolved by**: new script `goethe-faust/scripts/count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` — reads `items-all-goethe-faust.json`, groups by (mediatype, sector, dc:type), outputs frequency table to `output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv`. Must be run before writing `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`. | §3.3, §3.4, §4 |\n| ✅ | Q5 | ACO IRIs confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`: `aco:AudioClip` = `https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`); `aco:AudioFile` = `https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile` (subclass of `aco:AudioItem`). Also present: `aco:AudioManifestation`, `aco:AudioExpression`, `aco:AudioItem`. Note: `aco:AudioClip` denotes a clip/excerpt — use `aco:AudioManifestation` for general non-musical audio unless dc:type specifically denotes a clip. | §3.1, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q6 | FaBiO has been deprecated by RDA — do not use FaBiO classes as targets. The old-config files are example/reference only; all class mappings must use RDA (or MO/ACO/VRA/EBUCore/RiC-O) in the new lookup. | §3.2, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q7 | `mo:MuscialExpression` (typo in old-config) → corrected to `mo:MusicalExpression` in CLASS_MAP. | §3.1, §4.2 |\n| ✅ | Q8 | mt007 (Not Digitized) — follows the same htype + sector + dc:type dispatch route as other mediatypes. No special exemption. | §3.5, §7 |\n\n---\n\n## 1. Critical files\n\n| Path | Role |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` | **New script** — frequency count of dc:type × sector for mt002/mt005; prerequisite for image/video config files |\n| `goethe-faust/output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv` | **New output** — dc:type frequency table by (mediatype, sector) |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New script** — generates the lookup |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New output** — type dispatch table |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/type2class.json` | Source: general dc:type → RDA classes |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json` | Source: audio dc:type → MO/ACO classes |\n| *(new)* `old-config/video_type2class.json` | Source: video dc:type → EBUCore Plus classes |\n| *(new)* `old-config/image_type2class.json` | Source: image dc:type → VRA Core (`vra:Image`) + LIO classes |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | Reference pattern for lookup CSV schema |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md` | Will need a new decision (D11) for this dispatch |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Must be updated |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Output CSV schema\n\n`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` — one row per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple:\n\n| Column | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `mediatype` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt001`) or `any` |\n| `sector` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/sparte005`) or `any` |\n| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal string as it appears in the corpus (the lookup key) |\n| `dc_type_en` | English translation (from old-config `en` field) |\n| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI (the primary rdf:type to emit alongside mocho:Manifestation) |\n| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `source_vocab` | Which vocabulary the class belongs to: `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `rico`, `doco`, `fabio`, `mocho` |\n| `notes` | Free-text notes from old-config `remarks` field |\n\n### 2.1 Lookup priority in the transform script\n\n1. Exact match on (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de)\n2. Match on (mediatype, `any`, dc_type_de)\n3. Match on (`any`, `any`, dc_type_de)\n4. No match → no additional rdf:type beyond mocho:Manifestation + htype\n\n---\n\n## 3. Class mapping: old-config → mocho-aligned\n\nThe old-config uses FRBR/FaBiO with 4 positional WEMI slots `[W, E, M, I]`.\nThe new lookup uses named columns and mocho-aligned vocabularies.\n\n### 3.1 Audio (mt001) — from `audio_type2class.json`\n\n| Old classes (M slot) | New `rdf_type_m` |\n|---|---|\n| `mo:Record`, `aco:AudioClip` | `aco:AudioClip` (MO/ACO distinction made at rdf_type_e if needed) |\n| `mo:MusicalManifestation` | `mo:MusicalManifestation` |\n| `fabio:AudioDocument` at E + `aco:AudioClip` at M | `aco:AudioClip` |\n\nKey audio mappings:\n- Musical (Schallplatte, CD, Langspielplatte, Folie, Schellackplate, Schallfolie+music topic): `rdf_type_w = mo:MusicalWork`, `rdf_type_m = mo:MusicalManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Non-musical audio (Audiofile, Hörfunksendung, Inszenierung, Tondokument non-music, Magnettonband/Vortrag): `rdf_type_e = fabio:AudioDocument`, `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Default audio: `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Note: `aco:AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`) is reserved for dc:type values that denote clips/excerpts specifically.\n\n### 3.2 Text (mt003) — from `type2class.json`\n\nFaBiO is deprecated by RDA. The old-config entries are reference examples only;\ndo not carry FaBiO class IRIs into the new lookup. Text types are typed at the\nManifestation level via RDA classes.\n\nSector-dependent:\n\n| Sector | `rdf_type_m` |\n|---|---|\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `rico:Record` (archival text document; htype takes precedence if present) |\n| sparte002 (Library) | `rdam:C10007` (RDA Manifestation) — equivalent to `mocho:Manifestation`; no additional subclass needed at this pass |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:Manifestation` only (no RDA text subclass without VRA equivalent) |\n| `any` | `rdam:C10007` |\n\n#### 3.2.1 Specific bibliographic categories (Thesis, Textbook, etc.)\n\nIn RDA, document categories are expressed via properties, not rdf:type subclasses.\nFor example, a Dissertation is expressed as `rdaw:P10004 has category of work` with\na controlled value — not as `rda:Dissertation` class. Therefore:\n\n- The dc:type string (e.g. `Dissertation`, `Lehrbuch`) is preserved as a literal\n  via property alignment (dc:type → RDA property), **not** promoted to rdf:type.\n- No `rdf_type_m` entry is emitted for specific bibliographic genres in the\n  Text+Library sector from this lookup table.\n- DoCO structural classes (`doco:Section`, `doco:Chapter`, etc.) continue to be\n  emitted via the **htype dispatch** (lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv), not here.\n\n**Future work**: Create a controlled vocabulary for DDB dc:type string values and\nalign it to an existing KB (e.g. GND Sachbegriff, RDA value vocabularies, or\nWikidata). This would allow dc:type literals to be resolved to LOD concept URIs,\nenabling richer faceting and cross-dataset type alignment beyond the current\nliteral-string lookup.\n\n### 3.3 Photo (mt002) — from `image_type2class.json` (new)\n\ndc:type dispatch → VRA Core + LIO classes:\n- VRA confirmed in mocho-full.owl (IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`)\n- LIO pending import confirmation (Q2); IRI base `http://purl.org/net/lio#`; classes `lio:Image`, `lio:PictorialElement`\n\n- Sector refinement:\n  - sparte005 (Museum): `http://purl.org/vra/Image` (+ `lio:Image` once Q2 resolved)\n  - sparte001 (Archive): `http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record` (archival photograph)\n  - `any`: `http://purl.org/vra/Image` as default\n- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (first implementation step).\n\n### 3.4 Video (mt005) — from `video_type2class.json` (new)\n\ndc:type dispatch → EBUCore Plus classes (confirmed in mocho-full.owl; prefix `ebucoreplus`,\nIRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`).\n\n- Manifestation-level target: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` (default) or `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`\n  for editorial/programme content, per dc:type value\n- Sector refinement:\n  - sparte004 (Mediathek): `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme types; `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` otherwise\n  - `any`: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default\n- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (first implementation step).\n\n### 3.5 Not Digitized (mt007)\n\nFollows the standard dispatch route: htype → sector → dc:type. The absence of\na digital surrogate does not exempt an object from type classification.\n`mocho:Manifestation` is always emitted as the base type; additional classes\nfollow from htype, sector, and dc:type values as for all other mediatypes.\n\n---\n\n## 4. Script: `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` (prerequisite)\n\nPrerequisite script that must be run before creating `image_type2class.json` and\n`video_type2class.json`. Answers Q4.\n\n```\nPurpose:    Frequency count of dc:type values in the corpus for mt002 (Photo) and\n            mt005 (Video), broken down by sector.\nUsage:      python count_dctype_by_mediatype.py\nInputs:     data/items-all-goethe-faust.json (streaming)\nOutputs:    output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv\n            Columns: mediatype, sector, dc_type_de, count\nDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib, collections)\n```\n\nImplementation:\n1. Stream `items-all-goethe-faust.json`; for each record extract `mediatype`, `sector`, and all `dc:type` values.\n2. Filter to mt002 and mt005 records only.\n3. Count occurrences of each (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple using `collections.Counter`.\n4. Write sorted CSV (descending by count within each mediatype × sector cell).\n5. Print summary: total records per mediatype, unique dc:type values per cell.\n\n---\n\n## 5. Script: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`\n\n### 5.1 Header\n\n```\nPurpose:    Generate lookup_dctype_to_class.csv — type dispatch table mapping\n            (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) to mocho-aligned rdf:type class IRIs.\n            Used by transform_edm_to_mocho.py for domain-specific rdf:type dispatch.\nUsage:      python gen_dctype_class_mapping.py\nInputs:     scripts/old-config/type2class.json\n            scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json\nOutputs:    output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv\nDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib)\nAssumes:    old-config files are read-only reference; class mapping to mocho-aligned\n            equivalents is encoded in CLASS_MAP dict in this script.\n```\n\n### 5.2 Implementation steps\n\n1. **Load source files** — `type2class.json` (general) and `audio_type2class.json` (audio).\n\n2. **Define `CLASS_MAP`** — dict mapping old FRBR/FaBiO class strings → new mocho-aligned IRIs:\n   ```python\n   CLASS_MAP = {\n       \"mo:MusicalWork\":           \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalWork\",\n       \"mo:MusicalManifestation\":  \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalManifestation\",\n       \"mo:Record\":                \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/Record\",\n       \"aco:AudioClip\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip\",\n       \"aco:AudioItem\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioItem\",\n       \"aco:AudioFile\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile\",\n       \"fabio:AudioDocument\":      \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/AudioDocument\",\n       \"fabio:DoctoralThesis\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/DoctoralThesis\",\n       \"fabio:MastersThesis\":      \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/MastersThesis\",\n       \"fabio:Thesis\":             \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Thesis\",\n       \"fabio:Textbook\":           \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Textbook\",\n       \"fabio:NewspaperArticle\":   \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/NewspaperArticle\",\n       \"fabio:ReportDocument\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/ReportDocument\",\n       \"fabio:WorkCollection\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/WorkCollection\",\n       \"doco:Section\":             \"http://purl.org/spar/doco/Section\",\n       # Generic FaBiO carriers (redundant with mocho:Manifestation) → omit\n       \"fabio:PrintObject\":        \"\",\n       \"fabio:AnalogItem\":         \"\",\n       \"fabio:DigitalItem\":        \"\",\n       \"frbr:Work\":                \"\",\n       \"frbr:Manifestation\":       \"\",\n       \"frbr:Item\":                \"\",\n       # TBD entries — flag for manual review\n       \"vra:Image\":                \"TBD\",\n       \"rico:Record\":              \"http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record\",\n   }\n   ```\n\n3. **Process audio entries** (`audio_type2class.json`):\n   - For each key (dc_type_de): read `class` array (positional: [W, E, M, I])\n   - Flatten lists at position M (e.g. `[\"mo:Record\", \"aco:AudioClip\"]`) → use first non-empty as primary\n   - Apply `CLASS_MAP` to resolve full IRIs; skip empty strings\n   - Set `mediatype = mt001`, `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field\n   - Emit one row per dc_type_de\n\n4. **Process general entries** (`type2class.json`):\n   - Same positional class array processing\n   - `mediatype = any` (the transform uses mediatype to route audio to audio_type2class; remaining types go here)\n   - Keep `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field\n\n5. **Add manual Photo/Video rows** — hard-coded in the script:\n   - `(mt002, sparte005, any, Photo/Museum)` → `rdf_type_m = vra:Image` (TBD pending VRA IRI confirmation)\n   - `(mt002, sparte001, any, Photo/Archive)` → `rdf_type_m = rico:Record`\n\n6. **Write CSV** — sort by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de).\n\n7. **Print summary**: total rows, rows with rdf_type_m populated, rows with TBD IRIs (need follow-up).\n\n---\n\n## 6. Dispatch priority and combination rules\n\nFour dimensions can contribute rdf:type triples for a ProvidedCHO. Their roles\nare complementary, not competing:\n\n| Dimension | Source | Output | When |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `htype` | `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | DoCO class (library) or RiC-O class (archival) | htype_001–029 → DoCO; htype_030–048 → RiC-O |\n| `mediatype` × `sector` × `dc:type` | `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | Domain class (ACO/MO/VRA/FaBiO/etc.) | Any ProvidedCHO with a dc:type value |\n| base | hardcoded | `mocho:Manifestation` | Always |\n\n**Combination rule**: Accumulate — both htype and dc:type dispatch can fire\nfor the same entity. Identical rdf:type IRIs are deduped. Both layers are\nindependent: an archival letter can be both `rico:Record` (from htype_034) AND\n`fabio:Letter` (from dc:type `Brief`). Neither blocks the other.\n\n### 6.1 Separation by htype domain\n\n- htype_030–048 (archival): htype dispatch produces RiC-O classes; dc:type dispatch\n  may also produce a more specific document genre class. Both emitted.\n- htype_001–029 (library/DoCO): htype dispatch produces DoCO structural classes\n  (Chapter, Section, etc.); dc:type dispatch may produce a FaBiO publication type.\n  Both emitted if present.\n- No htype: only dc:type dispatch contributes a specific class (beyond mocho:Manifestation).\n\n### 6.2 mediatype gates the dispatch table\n\n- `mt001` (Audio): use `audio_type2class.json` source rows → ACO/MO classes\n- All other mediatypes: use `type2class.json` source rows, filtered by sector\n- `mt007` (Not Digitized): follows standard dispatch — htype + sector + dc:type\n\n### 6.3 Priority order for the transform loop (implemented in `retype_entities()`)\n\n1. Always emit `mocho:Manifestation`\n2. Apply htype dispatch (existing `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`)\n3. Apply dc:type dispatch (new `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`), using mediatype to gate table\n4. Dedup: collect all rdf:type IRIs in a set, emit each once\n\n**Validation before finalising**: Run a sampling script (`sample_type_dispatch.py`)\non 50 random records per sector × mediatype cell to show what classes each strategy\nwould emit. Manual review determines if the accumulate model is correct or if\npriority overrides are needed for specific cases.\n\n---\n\n## 7. Sampling script: `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n\nA lightweight diagnostic script (not part of the transform pipeline) that:\n\n1. Reads `items-all-goethe-faust.json` (streaming, random sample)\n2. For each sampled record, shows:\n   - object_id, sector IRI, mediatype IRI\n   - dc:type value(s)\n   - htype code\n   - rdf:type classes emitted by htype dispatch (from lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv)\n   - rdf:type classes emitted by dc:type dispatch (from lookup_dctype_to_class.csv)\n   - combined rdf:type set (deduped)\n3. Samples at least 5 records per populated (sector × mediatype) cell\n4. Output: `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` + printed summary\n\nThis is a prerequisite for finalising `retype_entities()` in the transform script.\n\n---\n\n## 8. TBD items requiring follow-up before the transform is written\n\n- **VRA Core IRIs**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`; use `http://purl.org/vra/Image` for photo Manifestation-level type.\n- **LIO**: ❓ source at `mocho/ontology/lio.owl` (IRI base `http://purl.org/net/lio#`; classes `lio:Image`, `lio:PictorialElement`); `lio_import.owl` in `odk-ontology/` but not yet in `mocho-full.owl`. Needs ODK rebuild to confirm import. Blocks §3.3 museum photo sub-mapping.\n- **ACO IRIs**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. Use `aco:AudioManifestation` for general non-musical audio; `aco:AudioClip` reserved for clip/excerpt dc:types.\n- **EBUCore Plus**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` as `ebucoreplus` (IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`). Use `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default video type; `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme content.\n- **`mo:MusicalManifestation` typo**: old-config has `mo:MuscialExpression` (typo) — correct to `mo:MusicalExpression` in CLASS_MAP. ✅\n- **FaBiO**: deprecated by RDA — do not emit as rdf:type targets. Old-config entries are reference only. ✅\n- **dc:type frequency count (Q4)**: run corpus frequency script on `items-all-goethe-faust.json` for mt002 and mt005 before creating `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`. First implementation step.\n- **Not Digitized (mt007)**: ✅ follows standard htype + sector + dc:type dispatch.\n\n---\n\n## 9. ADR entry (D11, to be added to `alignment-adr.md`)\n\n**Decision**: Type dispatch beyond mocho:Manifestation is driven by a lookup table\n`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` keyed by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de), separate from\nthe property alignment table. The htype lookup (`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) remains\nthe primary dispatch for archival hierarchy types; the dc:type dispatch supplements it\nfor non-archival and cross-sector cases.\n\n---\n\n## 10. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`; check row count, TBD count in summary output.\n2. Grep output for `TBD` — all must be resolved before transform is written.\n3. Cross-check audio rows: every entry in `audio_type2class.json` with a non-empty M-slot class should appear in the CSV.\n4. Spot-check: `Schallplatte` → `mo:MusicalManifestation` at rdf_type_m; `Audiofile` → `aco:AudioManifestation` at rdf_type_m.\n5. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py`; review `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` for dispatch correctness.\n6. Update `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` with new script entries.\n7. Add D11 to `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md`.\n",
  "planFilePath": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/elegant-wondering-blanket.md"
}
```

This dispatch logic existed in\n`old-config/type2class.json` and `old-config/audio_type2class.json` (FRBR/FaBiO\nclasses, 4 WEMI levels), but was never ported to the mocho-aligned pipeline.\n\nThe current `alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv` only covers property alignment (EDM field →\nRDA property via DC→RDA map). The htype lookup\n(`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) covers archival hierarchy types (htype_030–048) but\nnot the full sector × mediatype × dc:type space.\n\nThis plan builds a new lookup file and generator script to fill that gap. Classes: `vra:Image`, `vra:Work`, `vra:Collection`, `vra:Agent`. Use `http://purl.org/vra/Image` for photo Manifestation-level type. | §3.3, §7 |\n| ❓ | Q2 | LIO source found at `mocho/ontology/lio.owl`; IRI base `http://purl.org/net/lio#`; classes: `lio:Image`, `lio:PictorialElement`. `lio_import.owl` exists in `odk-ontology/` but LIO is not in `mocho-full.owl` namespace declarations. **Blocked by**: addition of `lio.owl` import to `mocho-odk` (next mocho update). Until resolved, §3.3 museum photo rows use `vra:Image` only; `lio:Image` added in a follow-up pass after mocho-full.owl is rebuilt with LIO. | §3.3, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q3 | EBUCore Plus confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` (prefix `ebucoreplus`, IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`). Classes: `ebucoreplus:Asset`, `ebucoreplus:EditorialObject`, `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`, `ebucoreplus:MediaResource`, `ebucoreplus:Resource`. Use `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default video Manifestation-level type; `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for editorial/programme content. Correct `ebucore:` prefix → `ebucoreplus:` throughout. | §3.4, §4, §7 |\n| ❓ | Q4 | What dc:type values appear in the corpus for mt002 (Photo) and mt005 (Video), broken down by sector? **Resolved by**: new script `goethe-faust/scripts/count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` — reads `items-all-goethe-faust.json`, groups by (mediatype, sector, dc:type), outputs frequency table to `output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv`. Must be run before writing `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`. | §3.3, §3.4, §4 |\n| ✅ | Q5 | ACO IRIs confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`: `aco:AudioClip` = `https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`); `aco:AudioFile` = `https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile` (subclass of `aco:AudioItem`). Also present: `aco:AudioManifestation`, `aco:AudioExpression`, `aco:AudioItem`. Note: `aco:AudioClip` denotes a clip/excerpt — use `aco:AudioManifestation` for general non-musical audio unless dc:type specifically denotes a clip. | §3.1, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q6 | FaBiO has been deprecated by RDA — do not use FaBiO classes as targets. The old-config files are example/reference only; all class mappings must use RDA (or MO/ACO/VRA/EBUCore/RiC-O) in the new lookup. | §3.2, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q7 | `mo:MuscialExpression` (typo in old-config) → corrected to `mo:MusicalExpression` in CLASS_MAP. | §3.1, §4.2 |\n| ✅ | Q8 | mt007 (Not Digitized) — follows the same htype + sector + dc:type dispatch route as other mediatypes. No special exemption. | §3.5, §7 |\n\n---\n\n## 1. Critical files\n\n| Path | Role |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` | **New script** — frequency count of dc:type × sector for mt002/mt005; prerequisite for image/video config files |\n| `goethe-faust/output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv` | **New output** — dc:type frequency table by (mediatype, sector) |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New script** — generates the lookup |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New output** — type dispatch table |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/type2class.json` | Source: general dc:type → RDA classes |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json` | Source: audio dc:type → MO/ACO classes |\n| *(new)* `old-config/video_type2class.json` | Source: video dc:type → EBUCore Plus classes |\n| *(new)* `old-config/image_type2class.json` | Source: image dc:type → VRA Core (`vra:Image`) + LIO classes |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | Reference pattern for lookup CSV schema |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md` | Will need a new decision (D11) for this dispatch |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Must be updated |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Output CSV schema\n\n`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` — one row per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple:\n\n| Column | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `mediatype` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt001`) or `any` |\n| `sector` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/sparte005`) or `any` |\n| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal string as it appears in the corpus (the lookup key) |\n| `dc_type_en` | English translation (from old-config `en` field) |\n| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI (the primary rdf:type to emit alongside mocho:Manifestation) |\n| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `source_vocab` | Which vocabulary the class belongs to: `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `rico`, `doco`, `fabio`, `mocho` |\n| `notes` | Free-text notes from old-config `remarks` field |\n\n### 2.1 Lookup priority in the transform script\n\n1. Exact match on (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de)\n2. Match on (mediatype, `any`, dc_type_de)\n3. Match on (`any`, `any`, dc_type_de)\n4. No match → no additional rdf:type beyond mocho:Manifestation + htype\n\n---\n\n## 3. Class mapping: old-config → mocho-aligned\n\nThe old-config uses FRBR/FaBiO with 4 positional WEMI slots `[W, E, M, I]`.\nThe new lookup uses named columns and mocho-aligned vocabularies.\n\n### 3.1 Audio (mt001) — from `audio_type2class.json`\n\n| Old classes (M slot) | New `rdf_type_m` |\n|---|---|\n| `mo:Record`, `aco:AudioClip` | `aco:AudioClip` (MO/ACO distinction made at rdf_type_e if needed) |\n| `mo:MusicalManifestation` | `mo:MusicalManifestation` |\n| `fabio:AudioDocument` at E + `aco:AudioClip` at M | `aco:AudioClip` |\n\nKey audio mappings:\n- Musical (Schallplatte, CD, Langspielplatte, Folie, Schellackplate, Schallfolie+music topic): `rdf_type_w = mo:MusicalWork`, `rdf_type_m = mo:MusicalManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Non-musical audio (Audiofile, Hörfunksendung, Inszenierung, Tondokument non-music, Magnettonband/Vortrag): `rdf_type_e = fabio:AudioDocument`, `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Default audio: `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Note: `aco:AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`) is reserved for dc:type values that denote clips/excerpts specifically.\n\n### 3.2 Text (mt003) — from `type2class.json`\n\nFaBiO is deprecated by RDA. The old-config entries are reference examples only;\ndo not carry FaBiO class IRIs into the new lookup. Text types are typed at the\nManifestation level via RDA classes.\n\nSector-dependent:\n\n| Sector | `rdf_type_m` |\n|---|---|\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `rico:Record` (archival text document; htype takes precedence if present) |\n| sparte002 (Library) | `rdam:C10007` (RDA Manifestation) — equivalent to `mocho:Manifestation`; no additional subclass needed at this pass |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:Manifestation` only (no RDA text subclass without VRA equivalent) |\n| `any` | `rdam:C10007` |\n\n#### 3.2.1 Specific bibliographic categories (Thesis, Textbook, etc.)\n\nIn RDA, document categories are expressed via properties, not rdf:type subclasses.\nFor example, a Dissertation is expressed as `rdaw:P10004 has category of work` with\na controlled value — not as `rda:Dissertation` class. Therefore:\n\n- The dc:type string (e.g. `Dissertation`, `Lehrbuch`) is preserved as a literal\n  via property alignment (dc:type → RDA property), **not** promoted to rdf:type.\n- No `rdf_type_m` entry is emitted for specific bibliographic genres in the\n  Text+Library sector from this lookup table.\n- DoCO structural classes (`doco:Section`, `doco:Chapter`, etc.) continue to be\n  emitted via the **htype dispatch** (lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv), not here.\n\n**Future work**: Create a controlled vocabulary for DDB dc:type string values and\nalign it to an existing KB (e.g. GND Sachbegriff, RDA value vocabularies, or\nWikidata). This would allow dc:type literals to be resolved to LOD concept URIs,\nenabling richer faceting and cross-dataset type alignment beyond the current\nliteral-string lookup.\n\n### 3.3 Photo (mt002) — from `image_type2class.json` (new)\n\ndc:type dispatch → VRA Core + LIO classes:\n- VRA confirmed in mocho-full.owl (IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`)\n- LIO pending import confirmation (Q2); IRI base `http://purl.org/net/lio#`; classes `lio:Image`, `lio:PictorialElement`\n\n- Sector refinement:\n  - sparte005 (Museum): `http://purl.org/vra/Image` (+ `lio:Image` once Q2 resolved)\n  - sparte001 (Archive): `http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record` (archival photograph)\n  - `any`: `http://purl.org/vra/Image` as default\n- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (first implementation step).\n\n### 3.4 Video (mt005) — from `video_type2class.json` (new)\n\ndc:type dispatch → EBUCore Plus classes (confirmed in mocho-full.owl; prefix `ebucoreplus`,\nIRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`).\n\n- Manifestation-level target: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` (default) or `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`\n  for editorial/programme content, per dc:type value\n- Sector refinement:\n  - sparte004 (Mediathek): `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme types; `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` otherwise\n  - `any`: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default\n- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (first implementation step).\n\n### 3.5 Not Digitized (mt007)\n\nFollows the standard dispatch route: htype → sector → dc:type. The absence of\na digital surrogate does not exempt an object from type classification.\n`mocho:Manifestation` is always emitted as the base type; additional classes\nfollow from htype, sector, and dc:type values as for all other mediatypes.\n\n---\n\n## 4. Script: `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` (prerequisite)\n\nPrerequisite script that must be run before creating `image_type2class.json` and\n`video_type2class.json`. Answers Q4.\n\n```\nPurpose:    Frequency count of dc:type values in the corpus for mt002 (Photo) and\n            mt005 (Video), broken down by sector.\nUsage:      python count_dctype_by_mediatype.py\nInputs:     data/items-all-goethe-faust.json (streaming)\nOutputs:    output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv\n            Columns: mediatype, sector, dc_type_de, count\nDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib, collections)\n```\n\nImplementation:\n1. Stream `items-all-goethe-faust.json`; for each record extract `mediatype`, `sector`, and all `dc:type` values.\n2. Filter to mt002 and mt005 records only.\n3. Count occurrences of each (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple using `collections.Counter`.\n4. Write sorted CSV (descending by count within each mediatype × sector cell).\n5. Print summary: total records per mediatype, unique dc:type values per cell.\n\n---\n\n## 5. Script: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`\n\n### 5.1 Header\n\n```\nPurpose:    Generate lookup_dctype_to_class.csv — type dispatch table mapping\n            (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) to mocho-aligned rdf:type class IRIs.\n            Used by transform_edm_to_mocho.py for domain-specific rdf:type dispatch.\nUsage:      python gen_dctype_class_mapping.py\nInputs:     scripts/old-config/type2class.json\n            scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json\nOutputs:    output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv\nDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib)\nAssumes:    old-config files are read-only reference; class mapping to mocho-aligned\n            equivalents is encoded in CLASS_MAP dict in this script.\n```\n\n### 5.2 Implementation steps\n\n1. **Load source files** — `type2class.json` (general) and `audio_type2class.json` (audio).\n\n2. **Define `CLASS_MAP`** — dict mapping old FRBR/FaBiO class strings → new mocho-aligned IRIs:\n   ```python\n   CLASS_MAP = {\n       \"mo:MusicalWork\":           \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalWork\",\n       \"mo:MusicalManifestation\":  \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalManifestation\",\n       \"mo:Record\":                \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/Record\",\n       \"aco:AudioClip\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip\",\n       \"aco:AudioItem\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioItem\",\n       \"aco:AudioFile\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile\",\n       \"fabio:AudioDocument\":      \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/AudioDocument\",\n       \"fabio:DoctoralThesis\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/DoctoralThesis\",\n       \"fabio:MastersThesis\":      \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/MastersThesis\",\n       \"fabio:Thesis\":             \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Thesis\",\n       \"fabio:Textbook\":           \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Textbook\",\n       \"fabio:NewspaperArticle\":   \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/NewspaperArticle\",\n       \"fabio:ReportDocument\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/ReportDocument\",\n       \"fabio:WorkCollection\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/WorkCollection\",\n       \"doco:Section\":             \"http://purl.org/spar/doco/Section\",\n       # Generic FaBiO carriers (redundant with mocho:Manifestation) → omit\n       \"fabio:PrintObject\":        \"\",\n       \"fabio:AnalogItem\":         \"\",\n       \"fabio:DigitalItem\":        \"\",\n       \"frbr:Work\":                \"\",\n       \"frbr:Manifestation\":       \"\",\n       \"frbr:Item\":                \"\",\n       # TBD entries — flag for manual review\n       \"vra:Image\":                \"TBD\",\n       \"rico:Record\":              \"http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record\",\n   }\n   ```\n\n3. **Process audio entries** (`audio_type2class.json`):\n   - For each key (dc_type_de): read `class` array (positional: [W, E, M, I])\n   - Flatten lists at position M (e.g. `[\"mo:Record\", \"aco:AudioClip\"]`) → use first non-empty as primary\n   - Apply `CLASS_MAP` to resolve full IRIs; skip empty strings\n   - Set `mediatype = mt001`, `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field\n   - Emit one row per dc_type_de\n\n4. **Process general entries** (`type2class.json`):\n   - Same positional class array processing\n   - `mediatype = any` (the transform uses mediatype to route audio to audio_type2class; remaining types go here)\n   - Keep `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field\n\n5. **Add manual Photo/Video rows** — hard-coded in the script:\n   - `(mt002, sparte005, any, Photo/Museum)` → `rdf_type_m = vra:Image` (TBD pending VRA IRI confirmation)\n   - `(mt002, sparte001, any, Photo/Archive)` → `rdf_type_m = rico:Record`\n\n6. **Write CSV** — sort by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de).\n\n7. **Print summary**: total rows, rows with rdf_type_m populated, rows with TBD IRIs (need follow-up).\n\n---\n\n## 6. Dispatch priority and combination rules\n\nFour dimensions can contribute rdf:type triples for a ProvidedCHO. Their roles\nare complementary, not competing:\n\n| Dimension | Source | Output | When |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `htype` | `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | DoCO class (library) or RiC-O class (archival) | htype_001–029 → DoCO; htype_030–048 → RiC-O |\n| `mediatype` × `sector` × `dc:type` | `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | Domain class (ACO/MO/VRA/FaBiO/etc.) | Any ProvidedCHO with a dc:type value |\n| base | hardcoded | `mocho:Manifestation` | Always |\n\n**Combination rule**: Accumulate — both htype and dc:type dispatch can fire\nfor the same entity. Identical rdf:type IRIs are deduped. Both layers are\nindependent: an archival letter can be both `rico:Record` (from htype_034) AND\n`fabio:Letter` (from dc:type `Brief`). Neither blocks the other.\n\n### 6.1 Separation by htype domain\n\n- htype_030–048 (archival): htype dispatch produces RiC-O classes; dc:type dispatch\n  may also produce a more specific document genre class. Both emitted.\n- htype_001–029 (library/DoCO): htype dispatch produces DoCO structural classes\n  (Chapter, Section, etc.); dc:type dispatch may produce a FaBiO publication type.\n  Both emitted if present.\n- No htype: only dc:type dispatch contributes a specific class (beyond mocho:Manifestation).\n\n### 6.2 mediatype gates the dispatch table\n\n- `mt001` (Audio): use `audio_type2class.json` source rows → ACO/MO classes\n- All other mediatypes: use `type2class.json` source rows, filtered by sector\n- `mt007` (Not Digitized): follows standard dispatch — htype + sector + dc:type\n\n### 6.3 Priority order for the transform loop (implemented in `retype_entities()`)\n\n1. Always emit `mocho:Manifestation`\n2. Apply htype dispatch (existing `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`)\n3. Apply dc:type dispatch (new `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`), using mediatype to gate table\n4. Dedup: collect all rdf:type IRIs in a set, emit each once\n\n**Validation before finalising**: Run a sampling script (`sample_type_dispatch.py`)\non 50 random records per sector × mediatype cell to show what classes each strategy\nwould emit. Manual review determines if the accumulate model is correct or if\npriority overrides are needed for specific cases.\n\n---\n\n## 7. Sampling script: `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n\nA lightweight diagnostic script (not part of the transform pipeline) that:\n\n1. Reads `items-all-goethe-faust.json` (streaming, random sample)\n2. For each sampled record, shows:\n   - object_id, sector IRI, mediatype IRI\n   - dc:type value(s)\n   - htype code\n   - rdf:type classes emitted by htype dispatch (from lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv)\n   - rdf:type classes emitted by dc:type dispatch (from lookup_dctype_to_class.csv)\n   - combined rdf:type set (deduped)\n3. Samples at least 5 records per populated (sector × mediatype) cell\n4. Output: `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` + printed summary\n\nThis is a prerequisite for finalising `retype_entities()` in the transform script.\n\n---\n\n## 8. TBD items requiring follow-up before the transform is written\n\n- **VRA Core IRIs**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`; use `http://purl.org/vra/Image` for photo Manifestation-level type.\n- **LIO**: ❓ source at `mocho/ontology/lio.owl` (IRI base `http://purl.org/net/lio#`; classes `lio:Image`, `lio:PictorialElement`); `lio_import.owl` in `odk-ontology/` but not yet in `mocho-full.owl`. Needs ODK rebuild to confirm import. Blocks §3.3 museum photo sub-mapping.\n- **ACO IRIs**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. Use `aco:AudioManifestation` for general non-musical audio; `aco:AudioClip` reserved for clip/excerpt dc:types.\n- **EBUCore Plus**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` as `ebucoreplus` (IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`). Use `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default video type; `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme content.\n- **`mo:MusicalManifestation` typo**: old-config has `mo:MuscialExpression` (typo) — correct to `mo:MusicalExpression` in CLASS_MAP. ✅\n- **FaBiO**: deprecated by RDA — do not emit as rdf:type targets. Old-config entries are reference only. ✅\n- **dc:type frequency count (Q4)**: run corpus frequency script on `items-all-goethe-faust.json` for mt002 and mt005 before creating `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`. First implementation step.\n- **Not Digitized (mt007)**: ✅ follows standard htype + sector + dc:type dispatch.\n\n---\n\n## 9. ADR entry (D11, to be added to `alignment-adr.md`)\n\n**Decision**: Type dispatch beyond mocho:Manifestation is driven by a lookup table\n`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` keyed by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de), separate from\nthe property alignment table. The htype lookup (`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) remains\nthe primary dispatch for archival hierarchy types; the dc:type dispatch supplements it\nfor non-archival and cross-sector cases.\n\n---\n\n## 10. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`; check row count, TBD count in summary output.\n2. Grep output for `TBD` — all must be resolved before transform is written.\n3. Cross-check audio rows: every entry in `audio_type2class.json` with a non-empty M-slot class should appear in the CSV.\n4. Spot-check: `Schallplatte` → `mo:MusicalManifestation` at rdf_type_m; `Audiofile` → `aco:AudioManifestation` at rdf_type_m.\n5. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py`; review `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` for dispatch correctness.\n6. Update `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` with new script entries.\n7. Add D11 to `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md`.\n",
  "planFilePath": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/elegant-wondering-blanket.md"
}

{
  "plan": "# Plan: Build `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` — Type Dispatch for the Transform\n\n## Context\n\n`transform_edm_to_mocho.py` needs to assign domain-specific rdf:type subclasses to\nProvidedCHO entities based on three dimensions: mediatype (mt001–mt007), sector\n(sparte001–007), and the dc:type string value. This dispatch logic existed in\n`old-config/type2class.json` and `old-config/audio_type2class.json` (FRBR/FaBiO\nclasses, 4 WEMI levels), but was never ported to the mocho-aligned pipeline.\n\nThe current `alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv` only covers property alignment (EDM field →\nRDA property via DC→RDA map). It has no type dispatch. The htype lookup\n(`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) covers archival hierarchy types (htype_030–048) but\nnot the full sector × mediatype × dc:type space.\n\nThis plan builds a new lookup file and generator script to fill that gap. The\ntransform script will use it in `retype_entities()` as a second dispatch after\nthe htype lookup.\n\n---\n\n## 0. Overview\n\nOne-sentence framing of each section, task list, and open questions that must be resolved before implementation.\n\n### 0.1 Section chain\n\n1. **§1 Critical files** — lists all inputs, outputs, and files to update; establishes what exists vs. what must be created.\n2. **§2 Output CSV schema** — defines the lookup table structure and three-level fallback lookup priority that the transform script will use.\n3. **§3 Class mapping** — maps old-config FRBR/FaBiO/WEMI positional entries to mocho-aligned class IRIs per mediatype: audio (§3.1, MO/ACO), text (§3.2, RDA/FaBiO/DoCO), photo (§3.3, VRA+LIO), video (§3.4, EBUCore Plus), not-digitized (§3.5).\n4. **§4 Frequency script** — specifies `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py`: prerequisite script that counts dc:type × sector for mt002/mt005 to populate `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`.\n5. **§5 Generator script** — specifies `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`: reads old-config JSON files, applies CLASS_MAP, adds manual photo/video rows, writes the CSV.\n6. **§6 Dispatch priority** — defines how the four dimensions (base, htype, dc:type, mediatype×sector) combine: accumulate, dedup; mediatype gates the dispatch table; htype and dc:type are independent layers.\n7. **§7 Sampling script** — specifies `sample_type_dispatch.py` for empirical validation of the dispatch model across all sector × mediatype cells before the transform is finalised.\n8. **§8 TBD items** — lists unresolved IRIs and decisions that block implementation.\n9. **§9 ADR entry** — the D11 decision text to add to `alignment-adr.md`.\n10. **§10 Verification** — end-to-end checks: CSV completeness, TBD resolution, spot-checks, sampling review, README + ADR updates.\n\n### 0.2 Task list\n\n**Phase A — Prerequisites**\n- [ ] Write and run `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` → `output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv`\n- [ ] Review frequency output; populate `old-config/image_type2class.json` (mt002 dc:types × sector)\n- [ ] Review frequency output; populate `old-config/video_type2class.json` (mt005 dc:types × sector)\n\n**Phase B — Generate lookup**\n- [ ] Write `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`\n- [ ] Run script → `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n- [ ] Check summary: row count, TBD count = 0\n\n**Phase C — Validate**\n- [ ] Write `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n- [ ] Run sampling script → `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv`\n- [ ] Review dispatch output: spot-check `Schallplatte`, `Audiofile`, `Brief`\n\n**Phase D — Finalise**\n- [ ] Update `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` (new scripts)\n- [ ] Add D11 to `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md`\n- [ ] Revise `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` → `retype_entities()` to use new lookup\n\n### 0.3 Open questions\n\n| | # | Question | Blocks |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| ✅ | Q1 | VRA confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`: IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`. Classes: `vra:Image`, `vra:Work`, `vra:Collection`, `vra:Agent`. Use `http://purl.org/vra/Image` for photo Manifestation-level type. | §3.3, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q2 | LIO confirmed in `mocho-edit.owl`: class IRI `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image` (W3ID v1 namespace). Used in `mocho:Work` union alongside `vra:Work`, `rico:Record`, etc. Use `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image` for museum photo Manifestation-level type in §3.3. | §3.3, §8 |\n| ✅ | Q3 | EBUCore Plus confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` (prefix `ebucoreplus`, IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`). Classes: `ebucoreplus:Asset`, `ebucoreplus:EditorialObject`, `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`, `ebucoreplus:MediaResource`, `ebucoreplus:Resource`. Use `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default video Manifestation-level type; `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for editorial/programme content. Correct `ebucore:` prefix → `ebucoreplus:` throughout. | §3.4, §4, §7 |\n| ❓ | Q4 | What dc:type values appear in the corpus for mt002 (Photo) and mt005 (Video), broken down by sector? **Resolved by**: new script `goethe-faust/scripts/count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` — reads `items-all-goethe-faust.json`, groups by (mediatype, sector, dc:type), outputs frequency table to `output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv`. Must be run before writing `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`. | §3.3, §3.4, §4 |\n| ✅ | Q5 | ACO IRIs confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`: `aco:AudioClip` = `https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`); `aco:AudioFile` = `https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile` (subclass of `aco:AudioItem`). Also present: `aco:AudioManifestation`, `aco:AudioExpression`, `aco:AudioItem`. Note: `aco:AudioClip` denotes a clip/excerpt — use `aco:AudioManifestation` for general non-musical audio unless dc:type specifically denotes a clip. | §3.1, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q6 | FaBiO has been deprecated by RDA — do not use FaBiO classes as targets. The old-config files are example/reference only; all class mappings must use RDA (or MO/ACO/VRA/EBUCore/RiC-O) in the new lookup. | §3.2, §7 |\n| ✅ | Q7 | `mo:MuscialExpression` (typo in old-config) → corrected to `mo:MusicalExpression` in CLASS_MAP. | §3.1, §4.2 |\n| ✅ | Q8 | mt007 (Not Digitized) — follows the same htype + sector + dc:type dispatch route as other mediatypes. No special exemption. | §3.5, §7 |\n\n---\n\n## 1. Critical files\n\n| Path | Role |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` | **New script** — frequency count of dc:type × sector for mt002/mt005; prerequisite for image/video config files |\n| `goethe-faust/output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv` | **New output** — dc:type frequency table by (mediatype, sector) |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New script** — generates the lookup |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New output** — type dispatch table |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/type2class.json` | Source: general dc:type → RDA classes |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json` | Source: audio dc:type → MO/ACO classes |\n| *(new)* `old-config/video_type2class.json` | Source: video dc:type → EBUCore Plus classes |\n| *(new)* `old-config/image_type2class.json` | Source: image dc:type → VRA Core (`vra:Image`) + LIO classes |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | Reference pattern for lookup CSV schema |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md` | Will need a new decision (D11) for this dispatch |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Must be updated |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Output CSV schema\n\n`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` — one row per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple:\n\n| Column | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `mediatype` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt001`) or `any` |\n| `sector` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/sparte005`) or `any` |\n| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal string as it appears in the corpus (the lookup key) |\n| `dc_type_en` | English translation (from old-config `en` field) |\n| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI (the primary rdf:type to emit alongside mocho:Manifestation) |\n| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI (emit if present) |\n| `source_vocab` | Which vocabulary the class belongs to: `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `rico`, `doco`, `fabio`, `mocho` |\n| `notes` | Free-text notes from old-config `remarks` field |\n\n### 2.1 Lookup priority in the transform script\n\n1. Exact match on (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de)\n2. Match on (mediatype, `any`, dc_type_de)\n3. Match on (`any`, `any`, dc_type_de)\n4. No match → no additional rdf:type beyond mocho:Manifestation + htype\n\n---\n\n## 3. Class mapping: old-config → mocho-aligned\n\nThe old-config uses FRBR/FaBiO with 4 positional WEMI slots `[W, E, M, I]`.\nThe new lookup uses named columns and mocho-aligned vocabularies.\n\n### 3.1 Audio (mt001) — from `audio_type2class.json`\n\n| Old classes (M slot) | New `rdf_type_m` |\n|---|---|\n| `mo:Record`, `aco:AudioClip` | `aco:AudioClip` (MO/ACO distinction made at rdf_type_e if needed) |\n| `mo:MusicalManifestation` | `mo:MusicalManifestation` |\n| `fabio:AudioDocument` at E + `aco:AudioClip` at M | `aco:AudioClip` |\n\nKey audio mappings:\n- Musical (Schallplatte, CD, Langspielplatte, Folie, Schellackplate, Schallfolie+music topic): `rdf_type_w = mo:MusicalWork`, `rdf_type_m = mo:MusicalManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Non-musical audio (Audiofile, Hörfunksendung, Inszenierung, Tondokument non-music, Magnettonband/Vortrag): `rdf_type_e = fabio:AudioDocument`, `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Default audio: `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`\n- Note: `aco:AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`) is reserved for dc:type values that denote clips/excerpts specifically.\n\n### 3.2 Text (mt003) — from `type2class.json`\n\nFaBiO is deprecated by RDA. The old-config entries are reference examples only;\ndo not carry FaBiO class IRIs into the new lookup. Text types are typed at the\nManifestation level via RDA classes.\n\nSector-dependent:\n\n| Sector | `rdf_type_m` |\n|---|---|\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `rico:Record` (archival text document; htype takes precedence if present) |\n| sparte002 (Library) | `rdam:C10007` (RDA Manifestation) — equivalent to `mocho:Manifestation`; no additional subclass needed at this pass |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:Manifestation` only (no RDA text subclass without VRA equivalent) |\n| `any` | `rdam:C10007` |\n\n#### 3.2.1 Specific bibliographic categories (Thesis, Textbook, etc.)\n\nIn RDA, document categories are expressed via properties, not rdf:type subclasses.\nFor example, a Dissertation is expressed as `rdaw:P10004 has category of work` with\na controlled value — not as `rda:Dissertation` class. Therefore:\n\n- The dc:type string (e.g. `Dissertation`, `Lehrbuch`) is preserved as a literal\n  via property alignment (dc:type → RDA property), **not** promoted to rdf:type.\n- No `rdf_type_m` entry is emitted for specific bibliographic genres in the\n  Text+Library sector from this lookup table.\n- DoCO structural classes (`doco:Section`, `doco:Chapter`, etc.) continue to be\n  emitted via the **htype dispatch** (lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv), not here.\n\n**Future work**: Create a controlled vocabulary for DDB dc:type string values and\nalign it to an existing KB (e.g. GND Sachbegriff, RDA value vocabularies, or\nWikidata). This would allow dc:type literals to be resolved to LOD concept URIs,\nenabling richer faceting and cross-dataset type alignment beyond the current\nliteral-string lookup.\n\n### 3.3 Photo (mt002) — from `image_type2class.json` (new)\n\ndc:type dispatch → VRA Core + LIO classes:\n- VRA confirmed in mocho-full.owl (IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`)\n- LIO confirmed in mocho-edit.owl: class `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`\n\n- Sector refinement:\n  - sparte005 (Museum): `http://purl.org/vra/Image` + `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`\n  - sparte001 (Archive): `http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record` (archival photograph)\n  - `any`: `http://purl.org/vra/Image` as default\n- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (first implementation step).\n\n### 3.4 Video (mt005) — from `video_type2class.json` (new)\n\ndc:type dispatch → EBUCore Plus classes (confirmed in mocho-full.owl; prefix `ebucoreplus`,\nIRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`).\n\n- Manifestation-level target: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` (default) or `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`\n  for editorial/programme content, per dc:type value\n- Sector refinement:\n  - sparte004 (Mediathek): `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme types; `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` otherwise\n  - `any`: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default\n- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (first implementation step).\n\n### 3.5 Not Digitized (mt007)\n\nFollows the standard dispatch route: htype → sector → dc:type. The absence of\na digital surrogate does not exempt an object from type classification.\n`mocho:Manifestation` is always emitted as the base type; additional classes\nfollow from htype, sector, and dc:type values as for all other mediatypes.\n\n---\n\n## 4. Script: `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` (prerequisite)\n\nPrerequisite script that must be run before creating `image_type2class.json` and\n`video_type2class.json`. Answers Q4.\n\n```\nPurpose:    Frequency count of dc:type values in the corpus for mt002 (Photo) and\n            mt005 (Video), broken down by sector.\nUsage:      python count_dctype_by_mediatype.py\nInputs:     data/items-all-goethe-faust.json (streaming)\nOutputs:    output/dctype_frequency_mt002_mt005.csv\n            Columns: mediatype, sector, dc_type_de, count\nDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib, collections)\n```\n\nImplementation:\n1. Stream `items-all-goethe-faust.json`; for each record extract `mediatype`, `sector`, and all `dc:type` values.\n2. Filter to mt002 and mt005 records only.\n3. Count occurrences of each (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple using `collections.Counter`.\n4. Write sorted CSV (descending by count within each mediatype × sector cell).\n5. Print summary: total records per mediatype, unique dc:type values per cell.\n\n---\n\n## 5. Script: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`\n\n### 5.1 Header\n\n```\nPurpose:    Generate lookup_dctype_to_class.csv — type dispatch table mapping\n            (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) to mocho-aligned rdf:type class IRIs.\n            Used by transform_edm_to_mocho.py for domain-specific rdf:type dispatch.\nUsage:      python gen_dctype_class_mapping.py\nInputs:     scripts/old-config/type2class.json\n            scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json\nOutputs:    output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv\nDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib)\nAssumes:    old-config files are read-only reference; class mapping to mocho-aligned\n            equivalents is encoded in CLASS_MAP dict in this script.\n```\n\n### 5.2 Implementation steps\n\n1. **Load source files** — `type2class.json` (general) and `audio_type2class.json` (audio).\n\n2. **Define `CLASS_MAP`** — dict mapping old FRBR/FaBiO class strings → new mocho-aligned IRIs:\n   ```python\n   CLASS_MAP = {\n       \"mo:MusicalWork\":           \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalWork\",\n       \"mo:MusicalManifestation\":  \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalManifestation\",\n       \"mo:Record\":                \"http://purl.org/ontology/mo/Record\",\n       \"aco:AudioClip\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip\",\n       \"aco:AudioItem\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioItem\",\n       \"aco:AudioFile\":            \"https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile\",\n       \"fabio:AudioDocument\":      \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/AudioDocument\",\n       \"fabio:DoctoralThesis\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/DoctoralThesis\",\n       \"fabio:MastersThesis\":      \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/MastersThesis\",\n       \"fabio:Thesis\":             \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Thesis\",\n       \"fabio:Textbook\":           \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/Textbook\",\n       \"fabio:NewspaperArticle\":   \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/NewspaperArticle\",\n       \"fabio:ReportDocument\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/ReportDocument\",\n       \"fabio:WorkCollection\":     \"http://purl.org/spar/fabio/WorkCollection\",\n       \"doco:Section\":             \"http://purl.org/spar/doco/Section\",\n       # Generic FaBiO carriers (redundant with mocho:Manifestation) → omit\n       \"fabio:PrintObject\":        \"\",\n       \"fabio:AnalogItem\":         \"\",\n       \"fabio:DigitalItem\":        \"\",\n       \"frbr:Work\":                \"\",\n       \"frbr:Manifestation\":       \"\",\n       \"frbr:Item\":                \"\",\n       # TBD entries — flag for manual review\n       \"vra:Image\":                \"TBD\",\n       \"rico:Record\":              \"http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record\",\n   }\n   ```\n\n3. **Process audio entries** (`audio_type2class.json`):\n   - For each key (dc_type_de): read `class` array (positional: [W, E, M, I])\n   - Flatten lists at position M (e.g. `[\"mo:Record\", \"aco:AudioClip\"]`) → use first non-empty as primary\n   - Apply `CLASS_MAP` to resolve full IRIs; skip empty strings\n   - Set `mediatype = mt001`, `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field\n   - Emit one row per dc_type_de\n\n4. **Process general entries** (`type2class.json`):\n   - Same positional class array processing\n   - `mediatype = any` (the transform uses mediatype to route audio to audio_type2class; remaining types go here)\n   - Keep `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field\n\n5. **Add manual Photo/Video rows** — hard-coded in the script:\n   - `(mt002, sparte005, any, Photo/Museum)` → `rdf_type_m = vra:Image` (TBD pending VRA IRI confirmation)\n   - `(mt002, sparte001, any, Photo/Archive)` → `rdf_type_m = rico:Record`\n\n6. **Write CSV** — sort by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de).\n\n7. **Print summary**: total rows, rows with rdf_type_m populated, rows with TBD IRIs (need follow-up).\n\n---\n\n## 6. Dispatch priority and combination rules\n\nFour dimensions can contribute rdf:type triples for a ProvidedCHO. Their roles\nare complementary, not competing:\n\n| Dimension | Source | Output | When |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `htype` | `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | DoCO class (library) or RiC-O class (archival) | htype_001–029 → DoCO; htype_030–048 → RiC-O |\n| `mediatype` × `sector` × `dc:type` | `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | Domain class (ACO/MO/VRA/FaBiO/etc.) | Any ProvidedCHO with a dc:type value |\n| base | hardcoded | `mocho:Manifestation` | Always |\n\n**Combination rule**: Accumulate — both htype and dc:type dispatch can fire\nfor the same entity. Identical rdf:type IRIs are deduped. Both layers are\nindependent: an archival letter can be both `rico:Record` (from htype_034) AND\n`fabio:Letter` (from dc:type `Brief`). Neither blocks the other.\n\n### 6.1 Separation by htype domain\n\n- htype_030–048 (archival): htype dispatch produces RiC-O classes; dc:type dispatch\n  may also produce a more specific document genre class. Both emitted.\n- htype_001–029 (library/DoCO): htype dispatch produces DoCO structural classes\n  (Chapter, Section, etc.); dc:type dispatch may produce a FaBiO publication type.\n  Both emitted if present.\n- No htype: only dc:type dispatch contributes a specific class (beyond mocho:Manifestation).\n\n### 6.2 mediatype gates the dispatch table\n\n- `mt001` (Audio): use `audio_type2class.json` source rows → ACO/MO classes\n- All other mediatypes: use `type2class.json` source rows, filtered by sector\n- `mt007` (Not Digitized): follows standard dispatch — htype + sector + dc:type\n\n### 6.3 Priority order for the transform loop (implemented in `retype_entities()`)\n\n1. Always emit `mocho:Manifestation`\n2. Apply htype dispatch (existing `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`)\n3. Apply dc:type dispatch (new `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`), using mediatype to gate table\n4. Dedup: collect all rdf:type IRIs in a set, emit each once\n\n**Validation before finalising**: Run a sampling script (`sample_type_dispatch.py`)\non 50 random records per sector × mediatype cell to show what classes each strategy\nwould emit. Manual review determines if the accumulate model is correct or if\npriority overrides are needed for specific cases.\n\n---\n\n## 7. Sampling script: `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n\nA lightweight diagnostic script (not part of the transform pipeline) that:\n\n1. Reads `items-all-goethe-faust.json` (streaming, random sample)\n2. For each sampled record, shows:\n   - object_id, sector IRI, mediatype IRI\n   - dc:type value(s)\n   - htype code\n   - rdf:type classes emitted by htype dispatch (from lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv)\n   - rdf:type classes emitted by dc:type dispatch (from lookup_dctype_to_class.csv)\n   - combined rdf:type set (deduped)\n3. Samples at least 5 records per populated (sector × mediatype) cell\n4. Output: `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` + printed summary\n\nThis is a prerequisite for finalising `retype_entities()` in the transform script.\n\n---\n\n## 8. TBD items requiring follow-up before the transform is written\n\n- **VRA Core IRIs**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`; use `http://purl.org/vra/Image` for photo Manifestation-level type.\n- **LIO**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-edit.owl`; class `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`. Used in `mocho:Work` union. Apply to sparte005 museum photo rows in §3.3.\n- **ACO IRIs**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. Use `aco:AudioManifestation` for general non-musical audio; `aco:AudioClip` reserved for clip/excerpt dc:types.\n- **EBUCore Plus**: ✅ confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` as `ebucoreplus` (IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`). Use `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default video type; `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme content.\n- **`mo:MusicalManifestation` typo**: old-config has `mo:MuscialExpression` (typo) — correct to `mo:MusicalExpression` in CLASS_MAP. ✅\n- **FaBiO**: deprecated by RDA — do not emit as rdf:type targets. Old-config entries are reference only. ✅\n- **dc:type frequency count (Q4)**: run corpus frequency script on `items-all-goethe-faust.json` for mt002 and mt005 before creating `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`. First implementation step.\n- **Not Digitized (mt007)**: ✅ follows standard htype + sector + dc:type dispatch.\n\n---\n\n## 9. ADR entry (D11, to be added to `alignment-adr.md`)\n\n**Decision**: Type dispatch beyond mocho:Manifestation is driven by a lookup table\n`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` keyed by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de), separate from\nthe property alignment table. The htype lookup (`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) remains\nthe primary dispatch for archival hierarchy types; the dc:type dispatch supplements it\nfor non-archival and cross-sector cases.\n\n---\n\n## 10. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`; check row count, TBD count in summary output.\n2. Grep output for `TBD` — all must be resolved before transform is written.\n3. Cross-check audio rows: every entry in `audio_type2class.json` with a non-empty M-slot class should appear in the CSV.\n4. Spot-check: `Schallplatte` → `mo:MusicalManifestation` at rdf_type_m; `Audiofile` → `aco:AudioManifestation` at rdf_type_m.\n5. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py`; review `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` for dispatch correctness.\n6. Update `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` with new script entries.\n7. Add D11 to `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md`.\n",

}

This dispatch logic existed in\n`old-config/type2class.json` and `old-config/audio_type2class.json` (FRBR/FaBiO\nclasses, 4 WEMI levels), but was never ported to the mocho-aligned pipeline.\n\nThe current `alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv` only covers property alignment (EDM field →\nRDA property via DC→RDA map). It has no type dispatch. The htype lookup\n(`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) covers archival hierarchy types (htype_030–048) but\nnot the full sector × mediatype × dc:type space.\n\nThis plan builds a new lookup file and generator script to fill that gap. The\ntransform script will use it in `retype_entities()` as a second dispatch after\nthe htype lookup.\n\n---\n\n## 0. Used in `mocho:Work` union alongside `vra:Work`, `rico:Record`, etc. Use `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image` for museum photo Manifestation-level type in §3.3. | §3.3, §8 |\n| ✅ | Q3 | EBUCore Plus confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` (prefix `ebucoreplus`, IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`).
